name: Grilled Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose colorful, ripe garden-fresh vegetables such as summer squash, eggplant, onions, and various colored bell peppers.
2. Cut eggplant, onions, and squash on the bias into slices about 1/2 inch thick.
3. Cut peppers into 2 to 3-inch strips or large scallops.
4. About an hour before cooking, combine vegetables with a good olive oil-based vinaigrette or use balsamic vinegar and olive oil mixed with minced garlic, basil, pepper, and salt.
5. Prepare a BBQ fire using fruit wood or mesquite chips.
6. When coals are evenly at the white ash stage, drain vegetables well and grill on a fine mesh BBQ grid about 4 to 6 inches from the coals.
7. Grill slowly until tender when pierced, turning several times and moving vegetables around with a fork to ensure even cooking. A little charring on the edges is desirable.
8. Enjoy warm, with or without a meat course, and use crusty French bread to soak up the flavorful juices.
